_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Modpack Downloader Hyper
author: rolexdevs@gmail.com
description: Downloads and extracts Minecraft modpacks from URLs. Extracts JAR files to /mods directory.
startup: echo 'Modpack Downloader - Download completed during installation. No runtime server.'

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

# Hyper Smart Modpack Installer (Python Based)
# Integrated RoleDev API Support
export CURSEFORGE_API_KEY='$2a$10$Mq226KUCWWFalJoPKe25YuHzCIKUoQJGx8ejyqhOyO92bF2cdX2dm'

# Force temp files to use the server volume (fixes 'no space left' on small rootfs)
mkdir -p /mnt/server/tmp
export TMPDIR=/mnt/server/tmp

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server || exit

# 1. Install Dependencies
echo "[Hyper] Installing dependencies (Python3, Requests, Java)..."
apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python3 python3-requests curl unzip openjdk-17-jre-headless >/dev/null 2>&1

# Fallback for requests if apt failed (some images minimal)
if ! python3 -c "import requests" &>/dev/null; then
    echo "[Hyper] Installing requests via pip..."
    apt-get install -y -qq python3-pip >/dev/null 2>&1
    pip3 install requests --quiet
fi

# 2. Download Python Installer Script
# REPLACE THIS URL WITH YOUR HOSTED LOCATION OF installer.py
INSTALLER_URL="https://r2.rolexdev.tech/java/modpacks/installer.py"

echo "[Hyper] Downloading installer logic..."
curl -sL -o installer.py "$INSTALLER_URL"

# 3. Run Installer
echo "[Hyper] Launching Python Installer..."
python3 installer.py

# Cleanup
rm -f installer.py
rm -rf $TMPDIR

variables.name: Modpack Download URL
variables.description: The direct download URL for the modpack ZIP file.

variables.name: Modpack Filename
variables.description: The original filename of the modpack (for reference).

variables.name: Modpack ID
variables.description: The unique identifier for the modpack.

variables.name: Modpack Name
variables.description: The display name of the modpack.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The Minecraft version of the modpack.

variables.name: Modpack Version ID
variables.description: The modpack version ID to use for the installation.
